title: Licensed Practical Nurse
description: AbbVie is seeking a Licensed Practical Nurse to support clinical operations and patient care coordination. You'll assist patients, monitor vital signs, and coordinate care with clinical teams. Work remotely for a biopharmaceutical company advancing patient care through innovative medicines.
responsibilities: Monitor and record patient vital signs and health status
Provide direct patient care and assist with daily needs
Coordinate with nurses and physicians on patient care
Maintain accurate patient records and documentation

requirements.education: LPN diploma or Associate's degree in Nursing
skills: Ability to work in collaborative environment
